prompt: Mach mir Anki-Karten für die Covered Call Strategie. Ich will verstehen wann ich sie einsetze, wie das Payoff aussieht, und was der maximale Gewinn/Verlust ist. Am liebsten mit einem Payoff-Diagramm.
assertions: A Mermaid diagram showing the payoff profile is included (xychart-beta or flowchart)
Maximum gain formula and value are stated (premium + price difference to strike)
Maximum loss and breakeven point are mentioned
A concrete example with specific numbers (stock price, strike price, premium) is given
TSV export is included with #separator:tab header
